subparts.text: Differentiate between capital market and money market. 1
What is the role of financial institutions in the economy? 1
Differentiate between commercial paper and certificates of deposit. 2
Discuss the role of central banks in regulating the financial system. 2
How do call money markets help in regulating liquidity in the financial system? 3
What is the function of a depository in the context of securities trading? 3
Write a short note on LIC. 4

questions.question_text: Explain the nature and components of the financial system. Discuss the roles played by financial markets, institutions, and instruments in economic development. 1
Compare and contrast the features, participants, and functions of the capital market and the money market. Highlight their roles in mobilizing funds in the economy. 1
Summarize the key recommendations of the Raghuram Rajan Committee on financial sector reforms. Evaluate their impact on India's financial landscape. 2
Describe the structure of the depository system in India. Explain the processes of dematerialization and rematerialization and their importance in financial markets. 2
Discuss the features and participants of the government securities market in India. Explain its importance in raising funds for public sector projects. 3
Discuss the importance of Government Securities markets in the context of public sector borrowing and debt management. 3
Discuss the role of venture capital and private equity in funding startups and businesses. Highlight key investment strategies and the secrets of private equity success. 4
Describe the process of issue management in merchant banking 4
